<!-- block:h2 -->
## Title example
<!-- /block -->

<!-- block:paragraph -->
text <em>fmt</em> <strong>bold text</strong> <u>underline</u> and <mark>highlighted</mark> can have <mark><strong><em><u>all</u></em></strong></mark>
<!-- /block -->

<!-- block:image -->
![flower_](data:image/jpeg;base64,)
*title example*
<!-- /block -->

<!-- block:code -->
```
fn main() {
<span style="white-space:pre">	</span>println!("Hello World!");
}
```
<!-- /block -->
